narrative:
Liverpool Twp township has 2,625 registered voters, with 60.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
